message:
fix(bench): reduce fib benchmark from fib(45)x10 to fib(35)x3

The -e flag fix causes JS_EvalFunction to properly execute top-level
code, which means fib runs during template init AND benchmark run.
fib(45)x10 (~18 billion recursive calls) was causing CI timeouts.
fib(35)x3 (~54 million calls) is ~300x faster while still testing
frozen function performance.
